project_type: Python AI development kernel - graph-based workflow execution engine
build_system: No formal build system. pip install from requirements.txt.
test_framework: pytest with pytest-cov, fixtures in tests/conftest.py. Tests in tests/ directory.
build_command: python3.12 -c 'import runner; import kernel; import knowledge; import memory'
verification_instructions: Run pytest with coverage. All 473+ tests must pass with >= 90% coverage.
environment_constraints: No external network needed for tests. All tests are unit tests with tmp_path fixtures.
contribution_requirements: Tests must pass, coverage >= 90%, commit after each round
key_patterns: Module pattern: class per file in kernel/, tests mirror structure in tests/. Fixtures use tmp_path for isolation. State persisted as YAML. Knowledge store uses _index.yaml pattern. Runner supports 3 modes (dry-run, AI-reads-BOOT, subprocess). Graph nodes have transitions with conditions.
directory_structure: Root: runner.py (entry point), kernel/ (core engine: graph, state, reflector, evolution, philosophy), knowledge/ (skills, rules, patterns with store.py), memory/ (state_manager, decisions, reflections), tests/ (pytest tests)
